meta.phase-name: Stat Control Flattening and Currency Stats Models

phase-summary.outcome: Removed Space Movement and merge-inbox sections; flattened Features sliders directly into Stat Control. Added `currencystats` reusable stat schema and `currency` model extending it, with explicit inheritance-aware schema rendering and stat terminology updates.

file.description: Stat-control UI flattening, currency stat defaults, and model inheritance normalization.

tests.test: `typecheck` currently fails due pre-existing unrelated errors in `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx`; no new `space-explorer.tsx` type errors surfaced before failure.
